stimulus: According to sociolinguist Penelope Eckert, members of a speech community ______blank several social variables—age, gender, ethnicity, and class—that shape the language they use in everyday interaction.
stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
rationale:
Choice A is the best answer. The convention being tested is subject-verb agreement. The subject of the sentence is the plural noun phrase "members of a speech community," so the plural verb form "navigate" is required.

Choice B is incorrect because the singular "is navigating" doesn't agree with the plural subject. Choice C is incorrect because the singular "navigates" doesn't agree with the plural subject. Choice D is incorrect because the singular "has navigated" doesn't agree with the plural subject.
